columns.extraction_plan: The CONSORT flow diagram (FIG 1) on page 3 shows that 655 patients were randomly assigned to the 'Placebo + docetaxel + ADT' arm. Footnote 'c' clarifies that one patient assigned to the placebo arm received darolutamide, resulting in 654 patients analyzed for the primary end point in the placebo arm. Table 1 on page 5, under 'All Patients', also lists 'Placebo (n = 654)'.
